author: doll-agent
content:
Add tests/divmod_non_power.rs covering 5 non-power bases (Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, HermiteE, Laguerre) for divmod accuracy. Each basis routes through a power-basis pivot, so round-trip conversion errors could compound silently.

13 tests:
- Per-basis invariant: a(x) == q(x)*b(x) + r(x) at 6+ test points (eval-based, robust against representation drift).
- Per-basis higher-degree-divisor: q == 0, r == a.
- Per-basis exact-division zero-remainder (Chebyshev only with explicit T-basis coeffs).
- Per-basis division-by-zero errs.
